Memetic viruses are [[memes]] that spread at the expense of the [[biological fitness]] of their hosts.

They are close to but not identical to [[Hydroplane|Hydroplanes]] which spread at the [[Spiritual fitness|spiritual]] expense of their hosts. 

An example of what may be a biological fitness increasing meme that decreases spiritual fitness could be [[quiverfull]] if applied in a way that undermines the ability for children to spiritually develop
[[Category:Memetic viruses]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Memetic viruses]]
[[Category:Pages]]
